iti36:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti36:2.1:
“Monks, this holy life is lived, not for the sake of deceiving people, not for the sake of inveigling people,
not for the sake of the rewards of gain, offerings, & tribute, nor with the thought,
‘Thus may people know me.’
iti36:2.2: This holy life is lived for the sake of direct knowledge & full comprehension.”
iti36:3.1: For the sake of direct knowledge & full comprehension,
iti36:3.3: a holy life not handed down,
iti36:4.1: This path is pursued by those great in purpose,
iti36:4.4: as taught by the One Awakened,
iti36:4.6: will put an end to suffering & stress.
